Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.
